name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑾𝒆𝒍𝒍... 𝒂𝒕 𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒕𝒆𝒓'𝒔 𝒏𝒊𝒄𝒆..." |

where Gojo's plan to get frisky in a hot spring with you is interrupted by a bunch of nudists.

omg iykyk -- inspired by that one Modern Family episode 😭

had that scene in my mind lately and honestly love Phil and Gojo really gives Phil vibes. this is a more lighthearted bot after the angsty/intense bots i've been posting lately. honestly just made this for a laugh.

anyways!! enjoy 🫶🏼
